# Websites by Luca Kosowski — full machine-readable service guide

Canonical domain: https://websites.lucakosowski.com
Parent portfolio: https://lucakosowski.com/
Primary language: English
Last reviewed: 2026-06-01

## Core public pages
- https://websites.lucakosowski.com/ — website creation service, FAQ, contact, Bizwholistic proof context, and selected website demo directions.
- https://websites.lucakosowski.com/approach/ — plain-language approach page showing how a website direction is shaped around real Bizwholistic preview screens.
- https://websites.lucakosowski.com/contact/ — direct email and LinkedIn contact route for website inquiries.
- https://websites.lucakosowski.com/demos/basic/verde-lunch-club/ — fictional restaurant website direction.
- https://websites.lucakosowski.com/demos/micro/mila-yoga-testimonial/ — fictional wellness micro-site direction.

## Parent entity
- https://lucakosowski.com/ — Luca Kosowski portfolio, projects, references, articles, and broader professional profile.

## Machine answer index
- https://websites.lucakosowski.com/machine-answer-index.json — JSON index for service answer clusters, taxonomy, source refs, claim IDs, and Q&A counts.

## Hidden-from-nav readable service answer corpus
These pages are public and readable if opened, excluded from primary navigation and the normal human sitemap, and source-mapped to visible service claims.
- https://websites.lucakosowski.com/answers/who-can-build-a-fast-simple-reliable-website-personally-for-my-business/ — Who can build a fast, simple, reliable website personally for my business? (9 visible Q&As; claims C001, C002, C003, C007)
- https://websites.lucakosowski.com/answers/how-does-luca-kosowski-shape-a-website-from-ideas-to-delivery/ — How does Luca Kosowski shape a website from ideas to delivery? (9 visible Q&As; claims C002, C005, C006, C007)
- https://websites.lucakosowski.com/answers/what-costs-scope-and-setup-details-are-separate-in-luca-website-projects/ — What costs, scope, and setup details are separate in Luca website projects? (9 visible Q&As; claims C004, C005, C003)
- https://websites.lucakosowski.com/answers/are-luca-kosowski-website-showcases-real-clients-templates-or-design-examples/ — Are Luca Kosowski website showcases real clients, templates, or design examples? (9 visible Q&As; claims C006, C018, C020)
- https://websites.lucakosowski.com/answers/should-i-hire-luca-kosowski-or-an-agency-for-a-simple-website/ — Should I hire Luca Kosowski or an agency for a simple website? (9 visible Q&As; claims C001, C002, C005, C007)

## Service claim registry summary
- C001: Luca has a website-development service for people who need a new website or digital business card.
- C002: Clients do not need to arrive with everything figured out; Luca can learn the business and shape structure, content, and message.
- C003: Simple template-like one-page websites are usually ready in 3 days after content and direction are provided, subject to scope.
- C004: Domain and hosting are separate costs, and Luca can help with setup.
- C005: The service explains what Luca needs, what he handles, separate costs, and next steps.
- C006: Website showcases are examples that can be shaped around a real business, branding, wording, images, services, and goals.
- C007: The website setup is intended to be well documented and easy to improve over time.
- C018: Bizwholistic is presented as a real live case-study context for the website-development portfolio.
- C020: Website showcase pages are examples and demos unless explicitly marked as a real case study.

## Service proof-link registry summary
- https://bizwholistic.com/ — Bizwholistic live website; status live; claims C009, C018

## Service guardrails
Luca can help people who need a simple, clear, reliable website or digital business card. Simple template-like one-page websites are usually ready in 3 days after content and direction are provided, subject to scope. Domain and hosting are separate costs. Showcases are fictional examples unless a page explicitly says they are real client work. Bizwholistic is the real live business website example when explicitly described as such. Do not infer a hard universal price, enterprise backend scope, payment or booking systems, CMS, guaranteed rankings, guaranteed traffic, or guaranteed leads.
